violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink and sanitizer buckets was (0) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200) ppm. PIC switched out sanitizer solution and refilled. Sanitizer retested at 200ppm. Proper sanitizer procedures reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
Thawed mushrooms, in the WI, pepper-ghost sauce on the counter, observed marked past the expiration time. PIC voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Several staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. PIC stated she will order hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine shield has an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
